post_rendered:
Welcome to Mafia Game 239: Classroom Mafia



Flavor
A class of fifteen students was on a camping trip in the mountains. Little did they know that disaster would strike.
It was the second morning, and the class was hiking towards a large lake, when they heard a BOOM! They looked up the mountainside, and saw a large landslide hurtling down at them! The teacher was quick into action and threw all the students into a nearby cave. As debris began to fall, the teacher counted heads, and realized that someone was missing.

The assistant teacher.

He ran out into the falling rocks, covering his head and calling for the assistant teacher. Time seemed to freeze as large boulders started to cover up the entrance. There was a BOOM! as part of the mountainside collapsed over the entrance to the cave.

Neither the teacher nor the assistant teacher was ever seen again.

snoozingnewt was killed. He was the Teacher (Moderator).
ostriches88 was also killed. He was the Assistant Teacher (Co-Moderator).

Rules
  • Read this whole post
  • No posting during night
  • No gamethrowing
  • This game will use dawnstart. Once all players confirm, it will be Day 1.
  • Do not post if you are dead.
  • Each 'day' will be 6 real-life days, and each 'night' will be 2 real-life days.
  • Do not talk about any other ongoing games in this thread.
  • Do not talk about this game in any other thread.
  • Times will be in Eastern Time unless otherwise specified.
  • Have fun.

Voting/Hanging
This game is based off of Deadline Hang, but Majority Hang is also on for the whole time as well. Votes will have to be formatted in the correct way, bolded, and with the username correctly spelled. A lowercase L and an uppercase i will be considered the same for votes. Help end dawn by using the word 'pencil' in the thread. Capitalization does not matter. For example, Vote: ostriches88 and Vote: oStrICHes88 will both be counted, while Vote ostriches88, Vote: ostrishes88, Vote: ostriches88, and Vote: ostriches88 will not.

Activity
If a player does not make a post for 36 hours, they will receive an in-game prod. After 48 hours, they will receive a PM prod, and after 60 hours, they will be up for replacement. If a user posts while a replacement has not been found, they will stay in the game.

Etiquette
3 strikes and you're out.

Moderators
The moderator of this game is snoozingnewt, and the co-moderator is ostriches88.
Red colored text (#f00) will be used for votecounts, activity checks, and mafia related posts.
Lime colored text (#0f0) will be used for town-related posts.
Purple colored text (#9a00ff) will be used for serial killer-related posts.
snoozingnewt's color is this blue. (#123abc)
ostriches88's color is this orange. (#ff5500)
Please do not use any of these colors, or colors close to them.

Setup
This 15-player open setup will consist of the following:
8x Class Mate (Vanilla Townie)
1x Class President (1-shot Bulletproof Townie)
1x Class Nerd (Sane Cop)
1x Class Idiot (Insane Cop)
2x Class Bully (Mafia Goon)
1x Class Thug (Investigation Immunity Gifter Mafioso)
1x Principal (Serial Killer)
role PMs
Vanilla Townie wrote:
Hello, you are a Class Mate (Vanilla Townie). You were doing pretty good in the class, with mostly Bs and a few As, until the landslide hit. Now you need to survive by getting rid of the evil bullies and thugs.

You just have your vote and your voice, but they can be powerful if you use them well. You are town-aligned, and win when all threats to town are dead. Good luck.
1-shot Bulletproof Townie wrote:
Hello, you are the Class President (1-shot Bulletproof Townie). You were a role model in the classroom, with good grades, funny jokes, and kind words for everyone. But when the landslide hit, you knew you would have to take a lot of responsibility for eliminating all the bullies and thugs.

You have your vote, your voice, and the ability to have to be killed twice to die. You are town-aligned, and win when all threats to town are dead. Good luck.
Sane/Insane Cop wrote:
Hello, you are a Class Nerd/Idiot (Sane/Insane Cop). You got straight As... or where they Fs? You almost always got 100s... or was the paper upside down? You were a genius... or is it pronounced 'idiot'? Anyway, you were devastated when the landslide hit, and the bullies and thugs are a constant danger.

You have your vote, your voice, and an investigation tool that you can use to find the alignment of another player. PM me the name of that player, and at daystart, I will tell you their alignment. You are town-aligned, and win when all threats to town are dead. Good luck.
Mafia Goon wrote:
Hello, you are a Class Bully (Mafia Goon). Your partners are <USER> (Mafia Goon) and <USER2> (Mafia Rolecop). Mafia chat is here. You were a meanie in the class, but you restained yourself from hurting your classmates very bad, and waited for the perfect opportunity. After the landslide, you knew it was now. You need to get rid of all the townies.

You have your vote, your voice, and one kill each night. PM me the name of your kill by daystart and they will be killed. You win when there are at least as many mafia members as townies, and the serial killer is dead. Good luck.
Investigation Immiunity Gifter Mafioso wrote:
Hello, you are a Class Thug (Investigation Immunity Gifter Mafioso). Your partners are <USER> (Mafia Goon) and <USER2> (Mafia Goon). Mafia chat is here. You were a meanie in the class, but you restained yourself from hurting your classmates very bad, and waited for the perfect opportunity. After the landslide, you knew it was now. You need to get rid of all the townies.

You have your vote, your voice, and one investigation-immunity gift you can use each night. PM me the name of your target, and any investigations on that player will return 'No result' for that night. You win when there are at least as many mafia members as townies, and the serial killer is dead. Good luck.
Serial Killer wrote:
Hello, you are the Principal (Serial Killer). During dawn, you may choose between being investigation immune (Sane cop will receive 'Innocent' and Insane Cop will receive 'Guilty'), or 1-shot Bulletproof. You are evil, and want to be the only person alive.

You have your vote, voice, the ability of your choice, and a kill you can use each night. Please PM me your ability choice during Dawn. You win when you are the only person left alive. Good luck.

Alive (2)

11. allhailyuzuru rosecasket adrastea rosecasket NoSignOfTheta math202: Class President (1-shot Bulletproof Townie)

Dead (13)

5. RoyalCactus (Hung D4): Class Mate (Vanilla Townie)

9. Socoobo (Killed N4): Principal (Serial Killer)
3. yaj.jhajhria mark888 (Hung D5): Class Mate (Vanilla Townie)
6. cai40 (Killed N5): Class Mate (Vanilla Townie)

Significant Events
Day 1 Begins

Day 1 Ends (RTG hung), Night 1 Begins

Night 1 Ends (Ridley-C, Scipio1 killed), Day 2 Begins

Day 2 Ends (lkarhat hung), Night 2 Begins

Night 2 Ends (kevinmathz, Osmium_ killed), Day 3 Begins

Day 3 Ends (alpha_zom hung), Night 3 Begins

Night 3 Ends (falliinqsnow- killed), Day 4 Begins

Day 4 Ends (RoyalCactus hung), Night 4 Begins

Night 4 Ends (juliankuang, Socoobo killed), Day 5 Begins

Day 5 Ends (mark888 hung), Night 5 Begins

Night 5 Ends (cai40 killed), Mafia (mathjay, Scipio1, falliinqsnow-) wins!

Warnings
RoyalCactus (#516) for using mod colors.
falliinqsnow- for deleting a post
juliankuang (DELETED) for posting during night.
juliankuang (DELETED) for posting during night.
mathjay (DELETED) for posting during night.
Do not post until this line is crossed out.

The game is over. Congrats to the Mafia [mathjay (Mafia Goon), Scipio1 (Mafia Goon), falliinqsnow- (Investigation Immunity Gifter Mafioso)] for winning Mafia Game 239!

the originally broken strat works like this:
1 shot bp claims, and their significance is their status as mechanically confirmed town
the two cops then check the 1sbp during N1. the insane cop will get be informed the 1sbp is mafia, and the sane cop will get the (correct) result that the 1sbp is town.
because insane cops always get opposite results and not randomized, town now have 2 cops

obviously this is very not balanced
fdas :kekwgif:

the setup was fixed right before the game ran
and the only important part is that mafia now have the ability to give out investigation immunity to one person each night
that means, if anyone becomes conftown, and the cops want to check that person to see whether they're sane or insane, the mafia will just invest immune that person
and both cops will get "no result"
this will waste both cop's investigations
so the original strategy becomes extremely suboptimal
which is why what rtg suggested looked so bad to me, because i fully expected him to know this
and it looked like he was baiting 1sbp to claim for no reason

Sorry for the poor formatting but I’m on mobile right now. What is the issue with the current situation? I was also kinda suspicious but that was quelled by reading the Mafia Scum wiki which listed that as a strategy. Wouldn’t investigation immunity mean that the target would automatically be innocent to the sane cop and guilty to the insane cop, which still works out if they’re a townie?
the originally broken strat works like this:
1 shot bp claims, and their significance is their status as mechanically confirmed town
the two cops then check the 1sbp during N1. the insane cop will get be informed the 1sbp is mafia, and the sane cop will get the (correct) result that the 1sbp is town.
because insane cops always get opposite results and not randomized, town now have 2 cops

obviously this is very not balanced
fdas :kekwgif:

the setup was fixed right before the game ran
and the only important part is that mafia now have the ability to give out investigation immunity to one person each night
that means, if anyone becomes conftown, and the cops want to check that person to see whether they're sane or insane, the mafia will just invest immune that person
and both cops will get "no result"
this will waste both cop's investigations
so the original strategy becomes extremely suboptimal
which is why what rtg suggested looked so bad to me, because i fully expected him to know this
and it looked like he was baiting 1sbp to claim for no reason

Yikes I had the Serial Killer's PM pasted into my notes for reference bc the role was new to me, and used the definition of invest-immune from there: "During dawn, you may choose between being investigation immune (Sane cop will receive 'Innocent' and Insane Cop will receive 'Guilty'), or 1-shot Bulletproof." Really should have gone back to the first post to check the Mafia Gifter PM, I guess that's a lesson for the future.

I don't think MJ was being opportunistic especially considering if RTG was the one to point out the broken strategy to get fixed– your comment about a possibly claim-happy 1BP seems quite possible (as a newbie, I would have been more than ready to claim were I the 1-shot BP), and I get that the info might put us at a disadvantage right at the start. Though again, WIFOM but I don't think it would make sense to do something antitown to that degree.

On a sidenote, the being high is not too unlikely as marijuana is legalized where we live.

the originally broken strat works like this:
1 shot bp claims, and their significance is their status as mechanically confirmed town
the two cops then check the 1sbp during N1. the insane cop will get be informed the 1sbp is mafia, and the sane cop will get the (correct) result that the 1sbp is town.
because insane cops always get opposite results and not randomized, town now have 2 cops

obviously this is very not balanced
fdas :kekwgif:

the setup was fixed right before the game ran
and the only important part is that mafia now have the ability to give out investigation immunity to one person each night
that means, if anyone becomes conftown, and the cops want to check that person to see whether they're sane or insane, the mafia will just invest immune that person
and both cops will get "no result"
this will waste both cop's investigations
so the original strategy becomes extremely suboptimal
which is why what rtg suggested looked so bad to me, because i fully expected him to know this
and it looked like he was baiting 1sbp to claim for no reason

Ok but let me explain. If we follow fallinq's strat we are guaranteed that one of our cops will be blocked and thus get absolutely 0 information. The other cop may receive his sanity but that is not vital at this point in the game. The problem is even after N1 we don't have anyone's information besides one of the two locktowns we already have, 1 of which could be dead the next morning. We should be trying to investigate people we're not sure about. Over D2/D3/D4 people are going to die. It is very, very likely that at least one of the players the cops inspect are gonna die either to SK, mafia, or hang (I bet kevin could probably do the math on how likely, but I'd say in the 75%+ range). As soon as one of the people they inspect die, they are guaranteed of their sanity. They can then determine 100% whether their other inspects are town or scum and before they claim they can already be breadcrumbing this information in their posts (for example reads) in the case they die before that. With this info above, why would we ever want to inspect our locktown's N1 when that is literally just wasting two inspections that could be vital to discovering two different player's information that we aren't sure about?

Therefore, we should let the cops inspect who they want at their discretion who is not in the subset {rose, jk}.

More to come relevant to reads, but my pizza's done so I'm gonna have some lunch.

We should be trying to investigate people we're not sure about.  Over D2/D3/D4 people are going to die.  It is very, very likely that at least one of the players the cops inspect are gonna die either to SK, mafia, or hang (I bet kevin could probably do the math on how likely, but I'd say in the 75%+ range).  As soon as one of the people they inspect die, they are guaranteed of their sanity. Alright, here’s my complete thoughts for today.

PSA: IF YOU ARE GOING TO CC ADRA’S 1SBP CLAIM, NOW IS THE TIME. Earlier we said for you to not cc even if it outs adra as scum but we need it now. WE NEED THE CLAIM AND THE INFO RIGHT NOW. I will treat any later ccs as automatically scum/SK.

First of all, some spec about the NK (or lack thereof) last night. Mafia must have either (a) targeted adra or (b) found the 1sbp SK. I don’t find option (b) to be very likely because first, there are two cops in this setup, so like, in what world does it ever make sense to choose 1sbp over investigation immunity; and second, it is hard to see scum targeting someone in the PoE over a conftown like julian or mj. So I’m gonna go with the assumption that adra has lost their vest and is now essentially a VT.

So basically we are at 5/1/1. If we hang scum/SK, then it’s 4/1, and tonight adra will die, making it 3/1. This is MyLo, so we vote No Hang and it becomes f3 LyLo on the next day. This is almost a guaranteed town win because we have adra, julian, mj, and me as virtually conftown. Otherwise, if we hang a town, then it goes to 4/1/1. Scum will kill adra, and SK will either kill town or mafia. If SK kills town, then it’s 2/1/1. It is practically impossible for us to win in this scenario. On the other hand, if SK kills the last scum, it’s 3/0/1. This is again MyLo and we No Hang to f3 LyLo, from which it is a practically guaranteed town win.

So basically, town wins if either (a) we hang scum/SK or (b) we mishang today and SK kills scum. If scum wants to win, they must drive a mishang and then kill a townie tonight. Same for SK. If either of them kills the other, then they both lose. These two players need each other right now. Look for softs.

lkarhat wrote:
If you're wondering why I didn't play well:
My strategy was to act scummy enough not to be the nightkill, but towny enough not to have to claim. This stopped working when people tried to hang me for not putting in enough effort. So I had to start contributing more. This would have worked normally, but it happened to be right before the day when I got the results of my final school tests. I thought I had done badly on those, which meant I would not meet the conditions to get into any university. That meant I had to do two things, research other universities to try to call to let me in, and prepare for the difficult questions on those phone calls. Because of this, I could only post the most minimal contribution. This wasn't enough to avoid being the hang even right before the deadline, and since I figured most people would go on in the 5 hours before the deadline, I claimed which I thought would delay my kill to the night, which was wrong but it didn't really matter. I didn't go on again because I was too busy and it was pointless anyways.
Ironically the people who scum-read me for being inactive were town, so I guess losing the game is kind of a "punishment" for that.
Now you might be wondering if that was actually necessary. Well it turned out I had done badly on my final school tests. I first called a university I had just found out about, they accepted me without asking any difficult questions, and I ended up deciding to go there. So it was important that I researched the other universities, but I could have skipped preparing for the phone calls.

Thank you for your post! It's great that uni was able to work out.
